basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography (CSIR NIO) Project Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CSIR NIO Project Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: MSc Marine Science MSc Oceanography MSc Physical Oceanography MSc Space Science and Technology

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 07-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR NIO to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NIO Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate position at CSIR NIO is 07-06-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc degree in Marine Science, Oceanography, Physical Oceanography, or Space Science and Technology to be eligible for the Project Associate position.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate position at CSIR National Institute of Oceanography as per the latest notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the CSIR NIO Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate recruitment at CSIR NIO.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the CSIR NIO Project Associate recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to apply through the official website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate position at CSIR NIO is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q8. Where is CSIR National Institute of Oceanography located?
faq.answer: CSIR National Institute of Oceanography is located in Goa.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive is SSP003833/3192-26.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation details. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for comprehensive information regarding age limits and relaxation policies.
